name: Chili Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can tomatoes with green chilies (8 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the chicken and place it in a large pan. Cover with water.
2. Add 1/2 cup onion, celery, and pepper to the pan. Cook until the chicken is tender.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan and discard the skin. Chop the remaining meat into bite-sized pieces.
4. Cut the corn tortillas into strips.
5. In a medium bowl, mix the chicken broth with flour (or cornstarch) to form a slurry. Stir in the tomatoes with green chilies until well combined.
6. Layer half of the tortilla strips on the bottom of a medium, non-stick baking dish.
7. Add half of the chopped chicken on top of the tortillas.
8. Sprinkle with remaining onion, green pepper, and cheese.
9. Repeat the layers of tortillas, chicken, vegetables, and cheese.
10. Top with additional cheese.
11. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
(416 calories per serving) 1 serving=1 1/2 Vegetable exchanges 2 Bread exchanges 4 Lean Meat exchanges 1/2 Fat exchange
Garnish with tomato and jalapeno pepper. If you have extra fat exchanges, use avocado or sour cream as additional garnishes. Remember, 1/8 avocado or 2 tablespoons sour cream equals 1 Fat exchange.
